workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Steven Wilson at Tailspin Toys just sent this. Help me identify the blockers.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-23 17:42 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Tailspin Toys account health

There's been a change in our timeline for account health. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
Date: 2024-01-14 09:48 EST
Subject: Re: account health Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the account health proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Tailspin Toys: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-O trap (MSX delta requires approval for obvious updates (next-step changes)); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-O failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-O failure mode (MSX delta requires approval for obvious updates (next-step changes))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-O -- MSX delta requires approval for obvious updates (next-step changes)
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
